name: Rapid City Elks Lodge #1187
about: Rapid City Elks Golf Course is an 18-hole, 5,909-yard public course located in the valley east of Rapid City, South Dakota. The facility offers a traditional golf experience with a full pro shop, club fitting services, and lessons available from golf professionals. The course is known for its scenic views, featuring creek-side vistas on the front nine and wetland preserves with elevated tees offering views of the prairie, Badlands, and Black Hills on the back nine. The venue also operates a simulator program with winter leagues and provides event hosting capabilities for weddings, corporate events, and other gatherings, supported by an on-site bar and grill.
why_golfers_like_it: Scenic 18-hole course with views of the Badlands and Black Hills
On-site golf professionals offering lessons and club fitting services
HD Golf simulators available for winter leagues and indoor play
Versatile event hosting capabilities with an on-site bar and grill
Well-maintained course suitable for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: On-site Bar & Grill available for dining and events
On-site Bar & Grill available for dining and events

simulator_hardware.notes: HD Golf is the best simulator you can buy. Incredible realism, accuracy and ease-of-use create an indoor golf experience with no comparison.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs, though the facility offers club fitting services and has a pro shop with merchandise available for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site Bar & Grill available for dining. For specific policies outside of this, it is best to contact them directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for an 18-hole round, but it is described as a 5,909-yard course that provides an 'inviting test for golfers of all skill levels.'

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly, offering a Junior Golf Program and being suitable for golfers of all skill levels, including beginners.
